channel.title: SettleWire
channel.description: Prediction markets news: regulation, volume, deals and data.

item.title: Prediction Markets Flag 3 Major U.S. Brands as High-Risk
item.description: Prediction market odds are now being used to assess survival prospects for three prominent American brands, according to a new 24/7 Wall St. analysis.

item.title: Lawsuit Challenges Prediction Markets as Unreliable Truth Machines
item.description: A newly filed lawsuit argues that prediction markets systematically produce unreliable probability estimates, directly challenging the core claim that these platforms serve as accurate forecasting tools.

item.title: Tribal Sovereignty vs. CFTC Authority: Federal Law Clash Over Prediction Markets
item.description: A legal battle pitting tribal gaming statutes against CFTC jurisdiction has emerged as Native American tribes seek to operate prediction markets under federal Indian gaming law, challenging the CFTC's regulatory monopoly over event contracts.

item.title: Kalshi traders weigh Maine Democratic field after Platner suspends campaign
item.description: Graham Platner ended his Maine Democratic campaign, prompting Kalshi prediction-market traders to immediately reprice odds on who will emerge as the party's next leading contender.

item.title: Kalshi Opens Wimbledon SF Market: Gauff vs Muchova Odds Live
item.description: Kalshi launched an event-contract prediction market for the Wimbledon women's singles semifinal between Coco Gauff and Karolina Muchova, allowing traders to wager on match outcomes in real time.

item.title: Polymarket launches major U.S. comeback campaign after four-year ban
item.description: Polymarket has launched an aggressive re-entry campaign targeting U.S. users in 2025, reversing the four-year exclusion that followed its 2022 CFTC settlement.

item.title: Kalshi Loses Bid to Escape New York Sports Licensing Rules
item.description: A New York court ruled against Kalshi, finding the prediction-markets platform cannot avoid the state's sports licensing requirements, in a decision that could reshape how event-contract operators navigate state oversight.

item.title: Burry bets on sportsbooks, predicts regulation will curb prediction markets
item.description: Legendary investor Michael Burry disclosed long positions in DraftKings and Flutter in Q1 2025, publicly predicting that incoming regulation will constrain prediction-market platforms like Kalshi and Polymarket.

item.title: Kalshi loses bid to override New York state gambling laws in federal court
item.description: A federal judge rejected Kalshi's attempt to use its CFTC-regulated status to preempt New York state gambling laws, dealing the prediction-markets platform a significant legal setback.

item.title: Google Bans Prediction Market Transactions, Draws Industry Backlash
item.description: Google has banned transactions related to prediction markets on its platform, a move that has prompted significant pushback from the prediction market industry.

item.title: Polymarket Opens U.S. Marketing Push After Regulatory Thaw
item.description: Polymarket has launched its first formal U.S.-facing marketing campaign, marking a significant strategic shift toward domestic customer acquisition following years of blocking American users.

item.title: Love Island Betting Markets Expand as Reality TV Contracts Go Mainstream
item.description: Prediction markets have added Love Island as a tradeable event, marking a significant push by platforms to attract retail bettors through popular reality-TV programming in 2025.

item.title: Polymarket launches U.S. influencer blitz, MLB deals to rebuild trust post-ban
item.description: Polymarket announced a broad U.S. marketing campaign on July 8, 2026, including TikTok influencer deals, Major League Baseball partnerships, and media agreements with CNN and CNBC as it works to re-establish credibility following a four-year domestic ban.

item.title: Sinner Heavy Kalshi Favorite Over Djokovic at Wimbledon
item.description: Jannik Sinner is listed as a heavy favorite against Novak Djokovic on Kalshi's Wimbledon prediction market, according to Sports Illustrated's coverage of the event contract.

item.title: Kalshi Denied Preliminary Injunction in New York Court
item.description: A New York court rejected Kalshi's bid for a preliminary injunction, denying the prediction-market platform temporary legal protection it sought in an ongoing state-level dispute.

item.title: Kalshi traders see Hormuz traffic disruption lasting through 2027
item.description: Prediction-market bettors on Kalshi are forecasting that shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz will not normalize until at least 2027, following the latest geopolitical setback to regional maritime routes.

item.title: Muni Bond Market Eyes Prediction Markets as Risk and Opportunity
item.description: Municipal bond analysts warn that the rapid growth of prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket introduces both pricing opportunities and liquidity risks for the $4 trillion muni sector, according to Bond Buyer.

item.title: Kalshi appeals NY court loss blocking sports event-contract state enforcement
item.description: Kalshi filed a same-day appeal to the Second Circuit on Tuesday, July 8, 2026, after SDNY Judge Analisa Torres denied its bid to stop New York State Gaming Commission officials from enforcing state gambling laws against its sports event contracts.

item.title: Polymarket Races to Rebuild Trust With US Market Recommitment
item.description: Polymarket is mounting a campaign to restore credibility and re-enter the US prediction-market space after a period of regulatory uncertainty and reputational damage, according to reporting by AP News and Yahoo Finance.

item.title: Polymarket odds call Johor state election before polls close Saturday
item.description: Prediction platform Polymarket has effectively declared a winner in Malaysia's Johor state election ahead of Saturday's vote, with contract prices reflecting a decisive anticipated outcome, according to South China Morning Post.

item.title: NY Court Lets Gambling Claims Against Kalshi Sports Contracts Proceed
item.description: A New York court declined to dismiss gambling-related claims against Kalshi's sports event contracts, allowing the legal challenge to move forward in what could be a landmark ruling for prediction-market operators.

item.title: Bloomberg: Prediction Markets Function Effectively Without Real-Money Stakes
item.description: A Bloomberg opinion piece argues that prediction markets can generate accurate forecasts even when no actual money is wagered, challenging the assumption that financial incentives are essential to their reliability.

item.title: Judge Torres Rules Against Kalshi in New York Prediction Markets Case
item.description: Federal Judge Analisa Torres, known for her Ripple/XRP ruling, dealt Kalshi a significant legal defeat in a New York court case tied to the company's prediction markets operations.

item.title: Kalshi loses bid to block New York sports-contract gambling enforcement
item.description: Judge Analisa Torres on Monday denied Kalshi's emergency motion to prevent New York authorities from enforcing state gambling laws against its sports-event prediction contracts.

item.title: Kalshi market prices OpenAI government stake at long-shot odds
item.description: Traders on Kalshi's prediction market are pricing in slim chances the U.S. government will acquire an equity stake in OpenAI before year-end 2025, according to CNBC.

item.title: Kalshi traders see Nasdaq-100 above 30,000 by end of 2026
item.description: Bettors on Kalshi's event-contract markets are pricing in a Nasdaq-100 finish above 30,000 at year-end 2026, implying expectations of a slower second half after recent volatility, according to CNBC.

item.title: Polymarket World Cup betting volume reaches $3.9B, attracting Trump and Zuckerberg
item.description: Polymarket's prediction-market wagering on the FIFA World Cup surpassed $3.9 billion in volume, drawing interest from Donald Trump and Mark Zuckerberg in the platform's explosive growth.

item.title: Polymarket enables instant Bitcoin deposits via Lightning Network
item.description: Polymarket activated instant Bitcoin deposits through the Lightning Network on Tuesday, powered by the Spark protocol, giving users a faster, lower-cost on-ramp to fund prediction-market positions.

item.title: Roosevelt Institute: Kalshi retail users lost $500M since launch
item.description: A Roosevelt Institute analysis finds that ordinary retail users on Kalshi have collectively lost approximately $500 million since the prediction-market platform launched, highlighting steep losses for everyday participants.

item.title: Chicago eyes ban on Kalshi, Polymarket trading by city insiders
item.description: Chicago is considering a prohibition on city employees with access to nonpublic information from trading on prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket, according to the Chicago Tribune.
